channel.title: Installation on IDPicker Docs
channel.description: Recent content in Installation on IDPicker Docs

item.title: System Requirements
item.description:
Minimum Requirements

List CPU, RAM, disk, and network requirements.

Supported Platforms

List supported operating systems and versions.

Dependencies

List required runtimes, tools, and services.

item.title: Setup
item.description:
Install Steps

Document installation commands or installer steps.

Configure Settings

Describe required configuration values.

Validate Installation

Provide checks to confirm successful setup.
